metadata.description: Edge uses 'knows-about' as the edge type, which is not in the valid edge type vocabulary (valid semantic types: depends-on, implements, relates-to, shares-assumption-about, extends, supersedes, owned-by). Fails the edge_type_valid Level 1 check.

concepts.name: EmbeddingService
concepts.description: Generates dense vector representations for concept descriptions and code semantic anchors using the intfloat/e5-base-v2 sentence-transformers model (768 dimensions). Batches input texts in groups of 32 for efficiency and normalises output vectors to unit length before storage in the sqlite-vec index.

concepts.name: VectorIndex
concepts.description: Maintains a sqlite-vec virtual table that stores 768-dimensional float32 embeddings keyed by concept UUID. Exposes an approximate nearest-neighbour search accepting a query vector and a top-k parameter, returning concept IDs ordered by cosine similarity.
